purpose: Single-line text entry: a light-DOM element wrapping a real <input> inside its own label, with optional format-as-you-type masking.
useWhen: The value is a single line of free text: names, emails, search terms, URLs.
The value has a fixed printed format (phone, date, code) — use `mask` so the field formats as the user types.
The value is numeric but still text-shaped (amounts, quantities) — pair `inputmode` with the right `type`.

notWhen.case: The user picks from a fixed set of options.
The value is a boolean on/off choice.

guidance: A placeholder is never a substitute for label content — the accessible name comes from the default children or an aria-label.
With a mask, `value` is always the masked form (and what submits); read `rawValue` for the value with literals stripped.
For checkboxes, radios, and buttons use their own zebkit components, not `type`.

default.description: The visible label content (the accessible name via the wrapping label).
guidance: Omit only when aria-label supplies the accessible name; the field must never be nameless.

prefix.description: Affix content at the field's inline start — any markup: svg, icon-font glyph, HTML character, image.
guidance: Affixes are aria-hidden: information an affix carries must also live in the field's accessible name or description.

suffix.description: Affix content at the field's inline end — any markup: svg, icon-font glyph, HTML character, image.
guidance: Affixes are aria-hidden: information an affix carries must also live in the field's accessible name or description.

keyboard.does: Submits the owning form (native behavior, preserved).

examples.title: Masked phone number
examples.why: The all-digit mask defaults inputmode to numeric; the masked form is the submitted value.

examples.title: Currency prefix
examples.why: The affix is aria-hidden, so the label carries the currency — never let the prefix be the only place the unit appears.

examples.title: Placeholder as label
examples.why: No accessible name: placeholders vanish on entry and are not announced as the name. Give it label children or aria-label.
